global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text elements promoting a streaming service.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to binge-watch new content for free.

elements.label: Ad background

elements.label: NeonCast UGC
elements.description: Bold text in a large font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad, with a modern and playful design.

elements.label: Binge starts now
elements.description: Text in a medium font size, centered in the ad, conveying excitement with a casual tone.

elements.label: New hits every week
elements.description: Smaller text below the main body text, providing additional information in a friendly style.

elements.label: Try for free
elements.description: A rounded button with bold text, inviting users to take action, positioned at the bottom of the ad.
